isi.lyrics:

Romanization

In this city
Feel a-mazin’
Can’t escape
nan yeogi gathyeoisseo
I don’t give a f**k about another sh*t
doro naenwa

I just want a-
(want it back)
I just want a-
(want it back)
I just want a-
(want it back)
I just want a-

I was in Seoul city
Feelin’ suicidal
domangchyeo nawa pajukkaji
sagikkun sae*neun gwiyeowo
heona dongsaengdeureun mot bwa na ajikkaji
jinagan gasibi dwae
iyuneun mutjido anko
doeeobeorideorago nae tasi

Well, I let it go
nan jinjja ssaasseo ‘deok’
chyeo eodeo meogeun sae*ga han teureok

I been drivin’
I been drivin’
I been drivin’
I be level it up
ije hae for my life
10nyeoniya OG jinjja
Call me papi
derigo gaji neoreul 4gaeui dollar sign

geomnaji ana naneun gumneun geon
hambeon deo sul ttago guwobeoriji gogireul
nan deunge kal kkophigodo
hambeon deo saranghal yonggireul nae maeume pumeo

deoneun hago sipji ana himdeun cheok
buseojiljieonjeong an naeryeo nae teok
I just tryna get some
maneun geol gyeokkeosseo
maja I might need a p*rc

(nae wanggwan and everything)

du nun ttokbaro tteuji I’m coldest

I say free my twin twin twin
ajikkaji still with me

doradanyeo nan teong bin geori
deuryeodabwasseo teong bin geoul
tteuneun deusi boyeodo nan noeul
majuhaji nae geomeun sogeul
jaeneun beobeul molla nan jeoul
dorabwatdeoni na honja gyeoul
A maze in
Amazin’
A maze in

Amazin’
A maze in

sagikkun sae*neun gwiyeowo

jinagan gasibi dwae

I just want a-

한번 더 사랑할 용기를 내 마음에 품어
